safety_tips.tip: Dress modestly at monuments & religious sites - cover shoulders and knees, especially at heritage and religious locations
You may be required to remove shoes at certain areas or use shoe covers at the Taj Mahal
Photography is allowed in most outdoor areas but restricted inside certain sections of monuments like the main mausoleum at the Taj Mahal
A polite but firm 'No, thank you' works well with persistent sellers or unofficial guides, especially near major attractions
Avoid loud behaviour in heritage spaces and keep public displays of affection minimal in crowded or traditional areas
Expect security checks, especially at the Taj Mahal. Follow queue systems and instructions from staff
Carry minimal belongings to make entry smoother, especially at Taj Mahal where large bags are not allowed

health_tips.tip: Stay hydrated and carry water, especially during daytime sightseeing
